channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Five Chinese nationals charged with covering up midnight visit to Michigan military site
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — U.S. authorities charged five Chinese nationals with lying and trying to cover their tracks, more than a year after they were confronted in the dark near a remote Michigan military site where thousands of people had gathered for summer drills.
item.dc:creator: ED WHITE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: ACLU lawsuit details DWI scheme rocking Albuquerque police
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — A civil rights group is suing the city of Albuquerque, its police department and top officials on behalf of a man who was among those arrested on suspicion of driving while intoxicated and allegedly forced to pay bribes to get the charges dropped.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN MONTOYA BRYAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Doctor who helped supply Matthew Perry ketamine pleads guilty
item.description: A San Diego doctor charged in connection with Matthew Perry’s fatal overdose pleaded guilty Wednesday to conspiring to distribute the surgical anesthetic ketamine.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Harris backs striking port workers, knocks Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris voiced her support Wednesday for striking port workers while bashing her rival former President Donald Trump after tens of thousands of longshoremen at ports along the East Coast and Gulf of Mexico walked off the job.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Frankie Valli addresses fan concerns about elder abuse
item.description: Legendary pop singer Frankie Valli says his choice to continue performing into his 90s is his own, despite concerns about possible elder abuse that stem from viral videos of the singer's recent shows.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KRON4

item.title: Parents spot kids in LA 7-Eleven robbery footage, turn them in to police
item.description: In each instance, the crew rolled up to the stores on bicycles during the evening hours and stole items, damaged property and left without paying, police said.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WGN 9

item.title: Parents spot kids in 7-Eleven robbery footage, turn them in to police
item.description: In each instance, the crew rolled up to the stores on bicycles during the evening hours and stole items, damaged property and left without paying, police said.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Man sentenced to 6 months in prison for effort to create giant sheep hybrids
item.description: A Montana man was sentenced to six months in prison for crimes committed during his effort to create a giant sheep hybrid for captive hunting, the Department of Justice (DOJ) said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Memorable moments from the vice presidential debate
item.description: Vice presidential nominees Sen. JD Vance (R-Ohio) and Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D) clashed Tuesday in what is likely to be the last debate of this presidential election season.
item.dc:creator: Sarakshi Rai, ABC 4

item.title: 11 Tennessee factory workers swept away in Helene floodwaters, company responds to evacuation decision
item.description: Workers from a Tennessee factory say they should not have been at work the day Hurricane Helene caused flash flooding in the area, as some did not make it home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vance called Harris a 'border czar' during the VP debate. What does that mean?
item.description: Republicans, including former President Donald Trump and his 2024 running mate, Senator J.D. Vance of Ohio, have increasingly referred to Vice President Kamala Harris as a failed "border czar.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Poll: Who won the Walz-Vance VP Debate?
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - Political scientists will tell you that vice presidential nominees rarely swing the election in favor of the candidate at the top of the ticket. But poll after poll shows this election cycle coming down to a percentage point across a handful of key swing states.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Walz on Tiananmen Square screw-up: 'I'm a knucklehead at times'
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D), pressed at the vice presidential debate over false statements he made in which he said he was present during the Tiananmen Square protests in 1989, said: “I’m a knucklehead at times.
item.dc:creator: Ian Swanson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: CBS cuts mics of Vance, Walz during immigration argument
item.description: The sparring started when Brennan clarified for debate viewers that Springfield “does have a large number of Haitian migrants who have legal status, temporary protected status.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: California firefighters in Hurricane Helene relief team recovering after crash in Texas
item.description: In a statement on Facebook, the San Diego Fire-Rescue Department thanked the community for their support during this difficult time.
item.dc:creator: Christa Swanson, KRON4

item.title: Two more suspects from viral Aurora, Colorado surveillance video served with arrest warrants: police
item.description: Warrants have been issued for two suspects' arrest after being identified from a viral surveillance video out of Aurora, Colorado last month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: McDonald’s is bringing back its famous ‘Boo Buckets,’ with a new color
item.description: McDonald's famous Boo Buckets are making a return just in time for Halloween, and a new color has joined the lineup this year.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, NewsNation

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs accused of sexual misconduct by 120 people, attorney says
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — An attorney said Tuesday he is representing 120 accusers who have come forward with sexual misconduct allegations against Sean “Diddy” Combs, the hip-hop mogul who is awaiting trial on sex trafficking charges.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Is the food in the fridge still good? California wants to end the guessing game
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California wants to help end the everyday household debate over whether the food in the fridge is still good to eat. Food labels that say “sell by” or “best before” are misleading because they have no universal meaning under current laws.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Workday down? User reports indicate problems with platform
item.description: Is your Workday down? You might not be alone. According to Downdetector.com, reports of people having problems with Workday spiked shortly after 10 a.m. Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, Fox 5

item.title: Why Tuesday's vice presidential debate could matter more than history suggests
item.description: Tim Walz and JD Vance might have the chance to reshape the political landscape Tuesday in their first and only debate.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: McDonald’s is bringing back its famous ‘Boo Buckets’ for the Halloween season
item.description: McDonald's famous Boo Buckets are making a return just in time for Halloween. The Boo Buckets, a customer-favorite which doubles as a trick-or-treating bucket, comes with Happy Meals. The company will introduce a blue bucket this year, replacing last year’s purple one.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Teens arrested for stomping on man's head during brutal armed attack in Baltimore
item.description: Two teens have been arrested for a brutal caught-on-video attack in Baltimore where a 66-year-old man was stomped in the head and mugged.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Experienced BASE jumper dies near Utah peak, sheriff says
item.description: Jonathan Bizilia, a 27-year-old BASE jumper, was found dead near Willard Peak in Utah last week after failing to check in with a friend, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Publix donates $1 million to support disaster relief following Hurricane Helene
item.description: Florida-based grocery chain, Publix, announced it's making a major contribution to help relief efforts in areas affected by the catastrophic damage left behind by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Kaycee Sloan, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Senate Democrat calls for Congress to return to pass disaster aid after Hurricane Helene
item.description: Sen. Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.) on Tuesday called for the Senate to return from its lengthy preelection recess to pass a disaster aid package following the damage left in multiple states by Hurricane Helene. “I think we should pass it yesterday.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, WGN 9

item.title: Helene's death toll surpasses 150 as crews continue to search for survivors
item.description: Exhausted emergency workers continued to work around-the-clock to clear roads, restore power and cellphone service, and reach people left stranded by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump and Harris' running mates are set to face off and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Startling video shows Russian fighter jet flying within feet of US F-16 near Alaska
item.description: ANCHORAGE, Alaska (AP) — Military officials have released new video of a startling encounter between a Russian fighter jet flying near Alaska and a U.S. Air Force F-16 sent to intercept it. In the video released Monday, the Russian plane comes from behind the camera and swoops by the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: When do hurricane names get retired?
item.description: With nearly two months to go until the end of what was predicted to be a "hyperactive" hurricane season, many residents along Florida's Gulf Coast and southeastern states are grappling with the damage and destruction left in the wake of the latest hurricane.
item.dc:creator: Kaycee Sloan, WGN 9

item.title: Favre tries to expand his defamation lawsuit against Mississippi auditor over welfare spending
item.description: Favre is not facing criminal charges, but he is among more than three dozen people or businesses the state is suing to try to recover misspent money through the Temporary Assistance for Needy Families program.
item.dc:creator: EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Florida Republican 'absolutely certain' there will be supplemental to address Helene aid
item.description: Rep. Kat Cammack (R-Fla.) said Monday she’s “absolutely certain” Congress will consider a supplemental aid package to provide additional disaster relief to areas devastated by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Basketball Hall of Famer Dikembe Mutombo dies at 58
item.description: Mutombo starred in the NBA for 18 seasons and is considered to be one of the greatest defensive players in the history of the sport.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, Fox 5

item.title: Maya Rudolph as Harris and Dana Carvey as Biden open the 50th season of 'Saturday Night Live'
item.description: “Saturday Night Live” began its 50th season with a parade of former co-stars, including Maya Rudolph as Vice President Kamala Harris, Andy Samberg as her husband Doug Emhoff and Dana Carvey as President Joe Biden.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Here's how CM Punk is helping WWE NXT's Roxanne Perez
item.description: CM Punk, in particular, has become a significant influence in her career, mentoring her through her rise in NXT.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, KTLA 5

item.title: Harris trolls Trump at Vegas rally and LA fundraiser, says her crowds are 'pretty big'
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris poked at Donald Trump over crowd sizes, his refusal to debate again and his privileged background on Sunday as she hauled in campaign cash in California and held a raucous rally at the same Nevada venue where the Republican nominee had appeared just two
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 3 California firefighters hurt in crash while heading to help Hurricane Helene victims
item.description: "These first responders put their own lives on the line every day, here at home and around the country when called," said San Diego Mayor Todd Gloria.
item.dc:creator: Christa Swanson, WGN 9
